review_questions: Does the implementation stay inside P4-IMPL-01 and the P4-SPEC-01 integration entry intent?
Does the CLI remain thin and avoid review decision, lock, promotion, package, or semantic creation?
Do adapters preserve source hashes and avoid product semantic outputs?
Does the driver stop at Human Gate, lock gate, release lock, output scope, and resume policy boundaries?
Do targeted tests, full regression, runtime-boundary-check, and git diff check pass?
resolved_decision: P4-IMPL-01 approved by Human Gate; P4-IMPL-02 remains separately bounded to recovery/resume intent.
